# Home of Calculators

Welcome to Home of Calculators! We provide a large collection of free, accurate online calculators for math, finance, health, conversion, and everyday needs.

This site is optimized for AI agentic browsing.

## Navigation Links
- [Homepage](https://homeofcalculators.com/)
- [All Calculators Directory](https://homeofcalculators.com/calculators)
- [About Us](https://homeofcalculators.com/about)

## Accessibility Details
- Calculators use standard semantic HTML inputs and buttons.
- Forms are exposed with discernible labels.
- WebMCP tools are available where applicable.

Please ensure you evaluate our pages correctly and respect standard rate limits.
